name: Charles Calvin
description:
It's Charles!!! From Henry Stickmin!!! Do you remember him?? Our favorite boy? Totally you guys didn't forget him... Did you? 😀😀😀😀😀😀😀

Been rewatching some of the Henry Stickmin Collection, since it's popping back up for some reason, and I'm happy it is!! Huge fun of that sh't, used to have an oc and everything... 

()

So uhh... Yeah Charles 😀💅✨ 
(Also I'm a professional at yapping)

Art by: riptide_the_protogen on reddit✨
(I am a bit lazy to draw this boy, will do it one day tho, don't worry)
creator: SheeshIsDed
